AI Workspace

Scan, explain, and secure contracts in one premium command deck.

AetherGuard now treats analysis like a live engineering workflow: structured scan phases, line-level risk guidance, a short-form AI explainer, and audit outputs designed for real production use.

Step-by-step AI audit

0%

Analyzing contract

Parsing Solidity and building execution graph.

Checking reentrancy

Inspecting external calls against state mutation order.

Detecting vulnerabilities

Combining heuristics with model classification.

Preparing remediation

Building the summary, fixes, and PDF-ready report.

Structured audit trail replaces loading spinners

Background contract telemetry

0%

Watching code changes

Debounced live scanner monitoring the current buffer.

Checking reentrancy

Looking for external-call patterns in active functions.

Fast live heuristics while you type

AI Explainer

Short, clear answers over the contract currently in focus.

Try asking

Explain why this contract is dangerous.

Show the minimum safe change.

Summarize this for a non-security engineer.

I’ll keep explanations concise, point to the likely root cause, and suggest the safest next change.

Audit intelligence

Summary, score, remediation guidance, and PDF-friendly reporting in one place.

Start typing to receive live AI risk feedback and run the premium audit when ready.

Issue families

Minimal, structured vulnerability clusters with click-through line targeting.

No dominant issue family detected. This contract currently looks comparatively stable.

Safe patterns and auto-fix preview

Signals we like and the direction the AI patcher wants to take.
